title: Salty Gooey Festive Pork Stir-fry
description: A halal-friendly Portuguese dish featuring a slow-cooked mixture of pork and garlic sauce, perfect for a festive dinner.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: For a stronger flavor, use larger garlic cloves.

instructions: Mix cornstarch and water in a small bowl until smooth.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add pork belly and cook for about 5 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Add garlic cloves, soy sauce, salt, pepper, cayenne pepper (if using), brown sugar, and lemon juice to the pan with pork. Stir well to combine.
Pour in cornstarch mixture while stirring continuously to prevent burning. Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 15-20 minutes or until sauce thickens slightly.
Serve hot as a main course with steamed rice.
